name: klanker
description: Klanker Maker sandbox platform — email orchestration, operator CLI, and sandbox identity

skills.name: sandbox
skills.description: Detect sandbox environment, discover email policy, verify tooling. Use when running inside a KM sandbox or checking sandbox identity.

skills.name: email
skills.description: Send, receive, and orchestrate email between sandboxes. Use when composing messages, polling for replies, delegating tasks, or coordinating multi-sandbox workflows.

skills.name: operator
skills.description: Request platform actions by emailing the operator. Use when scheduling operations, requesting reminders, extending TTL, adding budget, or managing sandbox lifecycle via email.

skills.name: user
skills.description: Operator CLI guide for the km command. Use when creating sandboxes, running agents, learning traffic patterns, managing lifecycle, or configuring the platform.
